finding_results.notes: Rebuilt Vess's market-square scan around posture, timing, and attention instead of the copied move-count ladder. The beat still delivers multiple concrete threat reads, Maren's pushback, and the cat-button joke without echoing the style-bible calibration line.

summary: Revised the market-square threat-assessment exchange so Vess remains flat, tactical, and funny while no longer reusing the style-bible example phrasing or its serial move-count structure.
